sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34494" key="e)mporiwnh/|tas" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμπορ-ιωνῄτας</orth> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ιδον-</foreign> cod.)<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">· ἐνοικίου πρακτῆρας</foreign>, i.e. those who <sense id="n34494.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">farm the tax paid by</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔμποροι</foreign>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
